name: Opening Drive Quality
description: Was the opening 15-min candle a quality drive or weak? Uses orb_breakout and gap_and_hold from live data.
state_logic: strong_open if orb_breakout OR gap_and_hold is True, otherwise weak_open

name: Price vs EMA50 Entry
description: Price distance from EMA50 at entry (% above/below). Uses price_vs_ema50 from live data.
state_logic: extended_above_50 if price_vs_ema50 > 10, below_50 if < 0, otherwise just_above_50

name: Consecutive Green Days
description: Number of consecutive up days before entry. Uses consec_green from live data.
state_logic: strong_run_3plus if consec_green >= 3, two_green if == 2, otherwise one_or_less

name: Weekly Trend Quality
description: Is the weekly chart in an uptrend? Uses rs63 (63-day RS) as proxy from live data.
state_logic: weekly_strong if rs63 > 1.2, weekly_weak if < 0.8, otherwise weekly_neutral

name: Distance from 52-Week High
description: How far below the 52-week high is the stock? Uses dist_from_52w_high (%) from live data.
state_logic: near_high if dist < 5%, deep_correction if > 20%, otherwise mid_range

name: SPY vs Sector Entry
description: Is the stock's sector hot or cold at entry? Uses sector_5d_chg (%) from live data.
state_logic: sector_hot if sector_5d_chg > 2, sector_cold if < 0, otherwise sector_neutral

name: ATR Expansion Entry
description: Is Average True Range expanding at entry (vol_ratio proxy)? Uses vol_ratio from live data.
state_logic: atr_expanding if vol_ratio > 1.5, contracting if < 0.8, otherwise stable_vol

name: Multi-Day Breakout
description: Is this a multi-day breakout building over several days? Uses persist_count from live data.
state_logic: multi_day_break if persist_count >= 3, emerging if 1-2, otherwise single_day

name: Inside Bar Resolution
description: Was there an inside bar followed by expansion at entry? Uses inside_bar bool from live data.
state_logic: inside_bar_setup if inside_bar is True, otherwise normal_bar

name: Earnings Drift Days
description: Post-earnings momentum drift: how many days since earnings catalyst. Uses days_since_earnings from live data.
state_logic: early_drift if 1-10 days since earnings, mid_drift if 10-30, otherwise stale_no_drift
